title: crantzia ambigua
intro: Crantzia ambigua is a type of plant species, also known as the Mexican prickly poppy or sand marigold. The medicinal properties of Crantzia ambigua lie in its roots, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, wounds, and skin conditions, ultimately providing several health benefits. Herbal preparations of Crantzia ambigua include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
